use_cases: Displaying team members or employee profiles on an about page
Showcasing featured contributors in a rotating carousel format
Presenting testimonial avatars with interactive hover states
Highlighting project team members with orbital animation effects
Creating interactive staff directories for organizational websites
ai_summary: An animated orbital carousel component for showcasing team members or profiles with smooth rotating animations, hover-triggered icon reveals (email, profile), and navigation controls. Built with Framer Motion for fluid transitions and Lucide icons for visual accents. Ideal for SaaS product team pages, organizational about sections, or creative portfolio showcases.
